title: French Goat Cheese Tartine
description: A classic French appetizer featuring creamy goat cheese on toasted bread, topped with pate, and garnished with crisp lettuce and served with a side of crunchy Aussie crackers.
instructions: 2. Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick rounds.
3. Arrange the bread slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
4. Spread a layer of goat cheese on each toasted bread slice.
5. Top the goat cheese with a layer of pate.
7. Serve with a side of Aussie crackers.
